title: Hosty catalog entry (marketplace.0.1)
description: One app's membership entry. Metadata and pointers only — the app's manifest and artifact live in the author's own repo/registry; the catalog never contains app code.

id.description: Reverse-DNS app id. Must match Hosty Core's app id rule and equal the folder name under apps/.

name.description: Display name for the storefront card. Falls back to the id when omitted.

icon.description: Icon: a repo-relative asset path (e.g. assets/icon.svg, rewritten to an absolute URL at publish) or an absolute https URL.

descriptionUrl.description: Absolute URL to a markdown long-description, generated at publish by vendoring the manifest's catalogMetadata.descriptionFile. Not hand-authored — the storefront emits it; a hand-written entry omits it.

feeds.description: The app's update feeds. A feed is a named pointer at a moving manifest ref (e.g. a branch raw URL): releasing = pushing to that ref, so this entry changes only when feed topology changes — never per release. The manifest's own `version` is informational display metadata; update detection compares content digests.

manifestRef.description: Absolute https URL to the app's manifest.json at a moving ref (typically a branch raw URL).

default.description: Marks the feed quick-install uses when several are declared. At most one per entry; meaningless (and unnecessary) with a single feed. Feed array order carries no meaning.

signerIdentity.description: Trust anchor a signed feed must match (verified once signing lands). Informational until then.
